title: Custom Partitioner for MapReduce
description:
This file provides a custom partitioner for use with Apache Hadoop MapReduce. The custom partitioner is responsible for partitioning keys based on certain criteria, such as a subset of the bytes in the key or the hash code of the key. The Partitioner interface is implemented to provide the necessary logic for partitioning keys. This allows users to define their own partitioning logic without having to modify the core Hadoop codebase.

--- DIRECTORY: lib ---
TITLE: Directory-level architectural abstraction for lib/partition
DESCRIPTION: The lib/partition directory is responsible for providing custom partitioners for use with Apache Hadoop MapReduce. These partitioners are used to partition keys based on certain criteria, such as a subset of the bytes in the key or the hash code of the key. The files in this directory collaborate by implementing the Partitioner interface and providing the necessary logic for partitioning keys. The architectural role of this directory is to provide flexibility and extensibility for custom partitioning strategies, allowing users to define their own partitioning logic without having to modify the core Hadoop codebase.

--- DIRECTORY: security ---
TITLE: MapReduce Delegation Token Architecture
DESCRIPTION: The MapReduce delegation token architecture is responsible for managing and generating delegation tokens specific to MapReduce. The DelegationTokenIdentifier class extends the AbstractDelegationTokenIdentifier class and provides functionality for creating and managing these tokens. The DelegationTokenSecretManager class is responsible for creating a MapReduce specific delegation token secret manager, which is used to generate and accept the password for each token. The DelegationTokenSelector class extends the AbstractDelegationTokenSelector class and specializes it for MapReduce.
